moonstone-white with blue veins visible at her temples like cracked porcelain
alabaster pale with faint lavender undertone like bruised marble under moonlight
ivory-pale translucent skin showing delicate veins at her throat and wrists
snow-white porcelain with rose-flush only where candlelight catches her lips
warm bronze catching candlelight like hammered copper burnished with age
deep golden-brown with amber undertones glowing warm against velvet shadows
rich olive with warm shadows pooling in her collarbones and throat
tawny sun-kissed brown luminous against black lace and midnight fabric
deep umber-brown with blue-black shadow collecting in the hollows
rich dark-brown with violet highlight where moonlight catches her cheekbones
deep espresso-brown with warm bronze sheen like polished cathedral wood
ash-grey pallor with faint silver sheen like something touched by frost
pearl-white skin so thin the candlelight seems to glow through her
porcelain-pale with cool blue undertones like winter moonlight on snow
cream-white with shadows settling violet in the curves of her collarbones
bone-white luminous skin that seems to collect darkness at her temples
warm honey-brown skin with golden light pooling along her jawline
bronze-kissed tan with copper highlights where firelight traces her cheekbones
deep caramel-brown skin with shadowed umber gathering beneath her eyes
rich sienna-brown glowing rust-orange where candles illuminate her throat
midnight-dark skin with cool undertones reflecting silver like obsidian glass
blackened-plum deep brown with indigo shadows in her elegant neck's hollow
cool slate-grey skin with pearl shimmer like moonlit fog made flesh
dusky mauve-brown with ashen shadows suggesting endless candlelit vigils
warm terracotta with smoky grey undertone like ancient frescoes lit by dying embers
